title: Ombudsmen Act 1975 — New Zealand Legislation
description: New Zealand statutory legislation establishing the role and functions of Ombudsmen as independent officers investigating complaints against public service agencies, state enterprises, and local organisations. Defines complaint procedures, investigation powers, confidentiality obligations, and reporting requirements to ensure public sector accountability.
